compiled_state.title: test-worktree-tracking-start-writes: test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present runs on session branch -> 1 of 6 fails (pre-existing)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Symptom
test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present in tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh fails on session branch worktree-20260418-215740 (HEAD includes recent merges from main):

```
FAIL: test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present: WORKTREE_TRACKING:start after ticket transition in Phase 1
  expected: found
  actual:   missing
```

5 of 6 tests pass; only test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present fails.

## Discovered During
Sprint epic ca48-c3c3 (Enrich Planning Pipeline Context), batch 3 commit for task 5b12-e68d. Test was discovered via .test-index mapping when agent modified plugins/dso/skills/sprint/prompts/task-execution.md. Failure exists on session branch independently of the agent's changes (verified by running test on session HEAD with no staged changes).

## Suspected Cause
The test asserts that sprint SKILL.md Phase 1 contains a WORKTREE_TRACKING:start instruction after ticket transition. The structure of Phase 1 may have shifted in a recent merge such that the assertion's pattern no longer matches.

## Workaround
RED marker added to .test-index for sprint/SKILL.md mapping so the test gate tolerates the failure during the active sprint. Marker should be removed and the test fixed to match current sprint SKILL.md structure.

comments.body: Triaged (debug-everything): test-file anti-pattern (Rule 5 or change-detector). Requires careful per-test conversion or deletion. Deferred to end-of-session user review.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fix identified: test_sprint_skill_worktree_tracking_start_present searches for first WORKTREE_TRACKING:start in SKILL.md globally (line 179 = resume scan description), but needs first occurrence AFTER the ticket transition line (line 200). Fix: filter grep results to only lines > _transition_line. Fix verified: all 6 tests pass with change applied. File: tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh lines 89-96.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: FIX VERIFIED (not yet committed due to concurrent worktree activity per INC-005): Change in tests/skills/test-worktree-tracking-start-writes.sh line 89 - replace single-line grep finding first WORKTREE_TRACKING:start globally with a loop that only counts occurrences AFTER _transition_line. Root cause: SKILL.md line 179 has a resume-scan description referencing WORKTREE_TRACKING:start BEFORE the actual in_progress transition at line 200. The instruction to POST WORKTREE_TRACKING:start is at line 202. The fix: search only lines > _transition_line. All 6 tests pass with fix applied.
comments.author: Test
